title: Metal MSAA silently ignored, no A2C (M3.1)

evidence.path: tests/test_msaa_sample_count.c + native-Metal MSAA0/MSAA4 pixel diff (89.5% edge-localized, sim-hash 0c10c8a9952539a0 identical both ways)

history.evidence: tests/test_msaa_sample_count.c + native-Metal MSAA0/MSAA4 pixel diff (89.5% edge-localized, sim-hash 0c10c8a9952539a0 identical both ways)
history.note: Metal now honors Video.MSAA: MS scene color attachment resolves into s_scene_color, rasterSampleCount plumbed through mtl_pso_for, A2C on alpha-tested cutouts under MSAA, SSAO off under MSAA (GL contract). MSAA=1 byte-identical to pre-fix; GE007_NO_METAL_MSAA negative control. Regression lane: ctest msaa_sample_count (fail-on-revert proven).
